docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUSENY, ADEM AS TO DEFENDANT ZHENG, YINGSHAO
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-29-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-24-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ADEM HUSENY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YINGSHAO ZHENG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER HILARY CHEN. THE NON-COURT INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE CLERK: R.SAHATJIAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY HUSENY, ADEM AS TO DEFENDANT ZHENG, YINGSHAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED APR-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHENG, YINGSHAO
